metadata.title: Cold-Chain Calculator
metadata.description: Work out the savings, CO₂ avoided and spoilage recovered when NanoFreeze cold layers replace refrigerated transport. Every calculation runs in your browser.

steps.scenarioDesc: Pick how you move your product — domestic or export, in boxes or pallets.
steps.productDesc: Transported product, units/value/weight per box or pallet, and the cold layers.
steps.logisticsDesc: Transport, frequency, distance and — domestically — the layer reuse cycle.
steps.spoilageDesc: How much spoilage the cold layers recover in the cold chain.
steps.resultsDesc: Savings, environmental impact and perishables rescued.

metrics.hint: Complete the steps to see your case.

scenario.intro: Each scenario loads a worked example with values you can adjust. Switching scenario replaces the values with that example's.
scenario.reuseHint: Layers are re-frozen and returned: reused trip after trip.
scenario.singleUseHint: On air freight layers travel with the cargo and don't return: single use.
scenario.resetNote: Switching scenario resets the values to the example.

cards.nacionalCajas: Domestic truck, product in boxes. Replaces the reefer truck and reuses the layers with return logistics.
cards.nacionalPallets: Domestic truck, product in full pallets. Same refrigeration replacement, layers per pallet layer.
cards.exportacionCajas: Air-freight export, product in boxes. Layers ride with the cargo; optional refrigerated land leg.
cards.exportacionPallets: Air-freight export, product in pallets. Single use per shipment; optional refrigerated land leg.

product.intro: Describe one carrier's worth of cargo (a box or a pallet) and the cold layers that go with it.
product.name: Product
product.boxLengthHint: Interior box length (cm). We use it to work out how many strips a layer needs.
product.guidedNote: Each strip is 15 × 25 cm. We round up to cover the box's full length.
product.manualToggleHint: Enter strips per layer and layers per box directly.
product.stripsPerLayerHint: Cold-layer strips at each level of the box.
product.layersPerBoxHint: Levels of cold layers inside the box.

logistics.introDomestic: Ground transport: reefer-truck cost, frequency, distance and the reuse cycle.
logistics.introExport: Air freight: rate per kg, shipments per month, distance and an optional land leg.
logistics.reeferPremiumHint: How much more the refrigerated truck costs vs. the non-refrigerated one.
logistics.reeferHoursPerTripHint: Hours the reefer unit runs on a trip.
logistics.hasReturnLogistics: Do the layers come back to be reused?
logistics.hasReturnLogisticsHint: With return logistics the layers are reused; without it, single use.
logistics.outboundDaysHint: The cycle adds outbound, return and re-freeze.
logistics.returnDaysOverrideHint: If omitted, assumed equal to the outbound days.
logistics.replaceReeferTruck: Replace a reefer truck on the land leg
logistics.replaceReeferTruckHint: If the layers also replace a collection reefer truck, add that saving.

spoilage.intro: Of everything you lose, the share the cold chain is to blame for — and what you'd still lose even with layers.
spoilage.spoilagePctHint: Percentage of the load lost today.
spoilage.coldChainSharePctHint: Of that spoilage, how much is due to refrigeration failures.
spoilage.residualSharePctHint: Spoilage that persists even with the cold layers.

results.assumptionsNote: FX {trm}/USD · the USD figure is indicative, not a live rate.

assumptions.title: Model assumptions
assumptions.intro: Every number the model takes for granted, with its explanation. You can change them — the calculation updates instantly.

footer.aboutBody: NanoFreeze's cold-chain savings model, released as free software under the MIT licence. Every calculation runs in your browser.
footer.disclaimer: Results are estimates based on the assumptions you enter. They are not a quote, a commercial offer, or a guarantee of savings. For a formal proposal, talk to NanoFreeze.
footer.privacy: No tracking cookies, no analytics, no server: we collect nothing.
